body:
See issue #4826 
In this branch, the MWE in [comment](https://github.com/CliMA/Oceananigans.jl/issues/4826#issuecomment-3355474437) returns
```julia
ssilvest@tartarus:/storage4/simone/TestsScaling/Oceananigans.jl$ for i in $(seq 1 3); do echo ""; echo "RUNNING with rank $i"; echo ""; ../openmpi/bin/mpirun -np $i julia --project -O0 test_memory.jl "latitude" ""; echo ""; echo ""; done

RUNNING with rank 1

No protocol specified
[ Info: Rank 0 running on device:
[ Info: CuDevice(0)



RUNNING with rank 2

No protocol specified
[ Info: Rank 0 running on device:
[ Info: CuDevice(0)
[ Info: Rank 1 running on device:
[ Info: CuDevice(1)



RUNNING with rank 3

No protocol specified
[ Info: Rank 0 running on device:
[ Info: CuDevice(0)
[ Info: Rank 1 running on device:
[ Info: CuDevice(1)
[ Info: Rank 2 running on device:
[ Info: CuDevice(2)
```

@taimoorsohail can you test that this fixes your issue?
closes #4826

title: Add a new tutorial for Models

body:
This PR should solve https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/issues/634 by including `AbstractFields`s in distributed reductions, as `x_minimum` used to compute the number of substeps is a `minimum` of a `KernelFunctionOperation` which should be communicated to all workers

@xkykai and @taimoorsohail does this PR solve your issue?
title: Include `AbstractOperations` in distributed reductions
